use_cases: Visualizing sales conversion funnels in e-commerce platforms
Displaying lead tracking workflows in CRM applications
Showing step-by-step user onboarding drop-off rates
Presenting conversion analytics in SaaS dashboards
Illustrating multi-stage process efficiency in business tools
ai_summary: A Reaviz-based funnel chart component with integrated metric displays showing KPIs with trend indicators. Features custom SVG icons, color-coded trend arrows, and smooth hover interactions. Designed for visualizing conversion funnels, sales pipelines, and multi-stage business processes with real-time data representation.
